apiSecret.title: API Secret
apiSecret.description: Wicket API secret (HMAC key used to sign JWT bearer tokens)

adminUserUUID.title: Admin User UUID
adminUserUUID.description: UUID of the Wicket admin user (used as the JWT 'sub' claim)

apiUrl.title: API URL
apiUrl.description: Full Wicket API base URL (e.g. https://sandbox-api.staging.wicketcloud.com). If omitted, derived from Tenant Name.

tenantName.title: Tenant Name
tenantName.description: Wicket tenant short name (e.g. 'acme'). Used to derive the API URL as https://{name}-api.wicketcloud.com when API URL is not provided.

issuerDomain.title: Issuer Domain
issuerDomain.description: Optional domain for the JWT 'iss' claim
